LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SLIM'S ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC DBA THE GREAT AMERICAN MUSIC HALL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT SLIM'S ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC DBA THE GREAT AMERICAN MUSIC HALL'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO COA 2 AND OVERRULED AS TO COA 4. CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT HIRING, SUPERVISION, AND RETENTION IS INSUFFICIENTLY PLEADED. LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 20 DAYS TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO THE NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/CM)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SLIM'S ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC DBA THE GREAT AMERICAN MUSIC HALL DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendant Slim's Entertainment Group, Llc Dba The Great American Music Hall's Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to Coa 2 and OVERRULED as to CoA 4.

Cause of action for negligent hiring, supervision, and retention is insufficiently pleaded. Leave to amend is granted. Plaintiff shall have 20 days to file an amended complaint.

Demurrer to the negligent infliction of emotional distress cause of action is overruled.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CM)
